历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 66378 → 69596 → 61444 → 63989 → 75982. Over the past five years, the overall trend shows a fluctuating backward shift. The 2025 baseline is about 75982, a backward shift of about 11993 from 2024, the largest decline in five years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 26 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 35 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 37, and the Medical Category plan is 8 (Medical majors were previously included in Physics Category), totaling 45, an increase of about 28.6% compared to 2025. The significant increase in enrollment slots eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking is approximately 195th (2025), with recent rankings stable around 190th, placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities. The Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 30th, rated as 'relatively hot', with high short video exposure, mainly featuring unique labels such as 'the world's highest university'. The reputation file shows no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps, and the overall application psychology is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, a remote western region, creating a sense of geographical distance for Hunan candidates, with application willingness weakened by regional preferences. Majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology are highly popular and recommended. Majors like Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are continuously discouraged. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was about 206,000 in 2021 → 320,000 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, with a continuous increase in candidate scale. In 2026, it increased by about 8.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition, though there has been a slight decline in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 75982, the significant enrollment expansion of about 28.6% in 2026 easing competition, the increase of about 8.4% in local Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, along with the stable university level, relatively hot Douyin popularity but no significant negative public opinion, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 88505, with a range of 88005–89005.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 22292 → 16647 → 15440 → 12080 → 12598. The 2026 plan is 25, an increase of about 66.7% compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment and alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking, it is 30th, rated as 'relatively hot'. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially recommended as relatively hot. prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西藏大学医学类在湖南省近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年73695名（计划5人），2023年62273名（计划9人），2024年62058名（计划7人），2025年75982名（计划9人）。2 025年位次大幅下滑至75982名，与当年扩招至9人及护理学（最低分专业）招生有关。2026年医学类计划缩减至8人，取消了护理学专业，新增口腔医学2人，预防医学增至3人，临 床医学减至3人。缩招及专业结构调整使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于西藏自治区拉萨市。作为西藏自治区唯一的综合性大学，其医学类专业在区域内具有独特地位，但对湖南省考 生而言属于跨省就读，地理位置偏远，一定程度上影响报考热度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等热门专业竞争激烈。西藏大学医学类在湖南省招生规模较小（2026年仅8人），专业结构以临床医学、预 防医学、口腔医学为主，取消了护理学，整体专业层次有所提升。西藏大学地处高原地区，气候与生活环境与湖南差异较大，部分考生会因此放弃报考，形成一定的地域性报考阻 力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年趋势，预测2026年西藏大学医学类在湖南省最低录取位次约为70417名，较2025年有所上升（更难进）。波动区间预计在69924至70910名之间。缩招及专 业结构调整是位次上升的主要驱动因素。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tibet University's medical category in Hunan Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 73,695 in 2021 (plan 5), 62,273 in 2023 (plan 9), 62,058 in 2024 (plan 7), and 75,982 in 2025 (plan 9). The ranking dropped sharply to 75,982 in 2025, related to the expansion to 9 students that year and the enrollment of Nursing (the lowest-scoring major). In 2026, the medical category plan is reduced to 8 students, with the cancellation of the Nursing major, the addition of 2 students in Stomatology, an increase to 3 students in Preventive Medicine, and a reduction to 3 students in Clinical Medicine. The reduction in enrollment and adjustment of major structure have slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a key national university under the 211 Project and is included in the Double First-Class construction initiative, located in Lhasa, Tibet Autonomous Region. As the only comprehensive university in the Tibet Autonomous Region, its medical majors hold a unique position within the region, but for Hunan Province candidates, it involves cross-province enrollment, and the remote geographical location affects the popularity of application to some extent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors nationwide continue to maintain high application popularity, with fierce competition for popular majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. Tibet University's medical category has a small enrollment scale in Hunan Province (only 8 students in 2026), with a major structure mainly consisting of Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, and Stomatology, and the cancellation of Nursing, resulting in an overall improvement in major level. Tibet University is located in a high-altitude area, with significant differences in climate and living environment compared to Hunan, leading some candidates to give up applying, forming a certain geographical application resistance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Tibet University's medical category in Hunan Province in 2026 is approximately 70,417, an increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 69,924 and 70,910. The reduction in enrollment and adjustment of major structure are the main driving factors for the ranking increase.
